userQuestion: reorder the same items customer Maureen McAuley bought last October

toolCalls._note: Gateway cut the call off at exactly 5:00.04. The downstream Lambda continued running and completed at 09:21:06 with a successful Fulfillment API 201 Created.

Catalog was warm from attempt 1, so this succeeded within Gateway's timeout. The retry's response is what the agent saw as success. But attempt 1 also placed a real order (vendor-ord-88441128) and charged the same amount.

actuallyHappened: Two real orders at the partner: vendor-ord-88441128 and vendor-ord-88441129, each charging the customer $184.37
